Index.title: Zekeriyaköy Science Academy | Sarıyer Istanbul
Index.description: Zekeriyaköy Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy — Comprehensive study programs in Sarıyer from 7th grade to graduate, LGS to YKS.

Hero.title: The Road to Success
Hero.subtitle: The right place to reach your target school in LGS and YKS.
Hero.headline: We Chart the Path to Your Goal Together
Hero.slogan: We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

HeroMain.subtitle: The right place to reach your target school in LGS and YKS. We stand by you with experienced teachers, individual follow-up and proven study programs.

Services.meta_description: Comprehensive and personalized study programs from 7th grade to graduate, LGS to YKS.
Services.title: Our Programs
Services.subtitle: Expertly designed study programs tailored to each student's goal.

7-sinif.title: 7th Grade
7-sinif.description: Preparation for 8th grade by strengthening middle school foundations. 12 lesson hours per week, Fen Bilimleri publications.
7-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation builds a bright future.
7-sinif.intro: Our 7th grade program aims to help students build a solid foundation in Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies. Supported by Fen Bilimleri publications and nationwide mock exams, the 12-hour-per-week program covers the current year and the critical 8th grade process together.
7-sinif.body: Each student's progress is individually monitored through regular topic tests and parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
7-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher support that individually monitors each student's development process.
7-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and smooth transition to the 8th grade program.
7-sinif.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 12.
7-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Homework tracking · Parent meetings
7-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive 12-hour-per-week program supported by Fen Bilimleri publications for 7th grade students.

8-sinif.title: 8th Grade & LGS
8-sinif.description: Intensive preparation for LGS. 14 lesson hours per week with Fen Bilimleri & 345 All Star publications toward your target school.
8-sinif.hero_quote: With the right strategy and intensive study, your target school is within reach in LGS.
8-sinif.intro: Our 8th grade program is a comprehensive LGS-focused preparation process. Supported by Fen Bilimleri and 345 All Star publications, the 14-hour-per-week program familiarizes students with the LGS format and maximizes their net score.
8-sinif.body: Continuous improvement is achieved through weekly LGS mock exams and detailed performance analysis.
8-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic revision of all LGS topics and addressing weak points.
8-sinif.phase2_text: Nationwide weekly LGS-format mock exams and detailed performance analysis.
8-sinif.phase3_text: Exam motivation, time management and techniques for coping with exam anxiety.
8-sinif.result_text: Achieving a high net score in LGS and placing in a science high school, Anatolian high school or target school.
8-sinif.tech_title: Fen Bilimleri + 345 All Star · 14 lesson hours/week
8-sinif.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri and 345 All Star publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 14.
8-sinif.tech_tools: LGS topic revision · Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Psychological support
8-sinif.meta_title: 8th Grade & LGS Preparation | Zekeriyaköy Science Academy
8-sinif.meta_description: Intensive 14-hour-per-week preparation program for LGS supported by Fen Bilimleri + 345 All Star publications.

10-sinif.title: 10th Grade
10-sinif.description: Strategic program to strengthen high school foundations. 10 lesson hours per week, Fen Bilimleri Publications.
10-sinif.hero_quote: 10th grade is the real beginning of the YKS journey.
10-sinif.intro: Our 10th grade program ensures students build a strong foundation in field subjects and transition to 11th grade prepared. TYT foundational skills are developed.
10-sinif.body: Progress is made with expert guidance on field selection, career planning and YKS goal setting.
10-sinif.phase1_text: A specialized program tailored to the numerical, verbal or equal-weight field.
10-sinif.phase2_text: Developing TYT foundational skills in Turkish, Math, Science and Social Studies.
10-sinif.phase3_text: Expert guidance on field selection, career planning and YKS goal setting.
10-sinif.result_text: Strong high school foundation, clear field decision and a ready start to the 11th grade program.
10-sinif.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 10.
10-sinif.tech_tools: Field subjects · TYT foundation · Career guidance · Evaluation
10-sinif.meta_description: Strategic 10-hour-per-week preparation program for 10th grade students.

11-sinif.title: 11th Grade
11-sinif.description: Critical period of YKS preparation. 14 lesson hours per week, Fen Bilimleri publications.
11-sinif.hero_quote: 11th grade is the year your YKS success takes shape.
11-sinif.intro: Our 11th grade program is the critical period when YKS preparation intensifies. Supported by Fen Bilimleri publications, the 14-hour-per-week program covers both TYT and AYT topics.
11-sinif.body: Continuous performance is monitored through weekly nationwide mock exams and development charts.
11-sinif.phase1_text: Sequential coverage of all TYT and relevant AYT topics with topic-based test applications.
11-sinif.phase2_text: Weekly nationwide YKS mock exams and development charts. Additional study plans for weak topics.
11-sinif.phase3_text: Maintaining motivation throughout the long preparation process and creating an effective study schedule.
11-sinif.result_text: Transitioning to 12th grade with a strong YKS foundation and superior performance in the target score type.
11-sinif.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 14.
11-sinif.tech_tools: TYT & AYT topics · Weekly mock exam · Performance report · Motivation
11-sinif.meta_description: 11th grade YKS preparation program. 14 lesson hours per week, Fen Bilimleri publications.

12-sinif.title: 12th Grade & YKS
12-sinif.description: Intensive YKS preparation. 18 lesson hours per week, full coverage and mock analysis.
12-sinif.hero_quote: This year is the year to turn all your dreams into reality.
12-sinif.intro: Our 12th grade program is the final and most critical process leading to YKS. With 18 lesson hours per week, topic revision, mock analysis and psychological support are carried out together.
12-sinif.body: The most efficient preparation process with weekly nationwide full YKS mock exams, detailed net analysis and university placement guidance.
12-sinif.phase1_text: Accelerated revision of all TYT and AYT topics. Individual plans focused on weak points.
12-sinif.phase2_text: Weekly nationwide full YKS mock exams, detailed net analysis and question-based evaluation sessions.
12-sinif.phase3_text: Comprehensive guidance and placement list creation for university and department selection after YKS.
12-sinif.result_text: Reaching the desired score in YKS and placing in the target university and department.
12-sinif.tech_title: Fen Bilimleri + 345 All Star · 18 lesson hours/week
12-sinif.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri and 345 All Star publications in this program. Weekly lesson hours: 18.
12-sinif.tech_tools: Accelerated revision · Weekly nationwide mock exams · Net analysis · Placement guidance
12-sinif.meta_title: 12th Grade & YKS Preparation | Zekeriyaköy Science Academy
12-sinif.meta_description: 12th grade YKS program. 18 lesson hours per week, weekly nationwide mock exams and university placement guidance.

mezun.title: Graduate & YKS
mezun.description: Flexible YKS preparation program specially designed for graduates. One-on-one lesson opportunities.
mezun.hero_quote: Learn from last year, make your mark this year.
mezun.intro: Our graduate program is specially designed for students seeking another chance in YKS. With one-on-one teacher support and flexible lesson hours, focus is directed toward the goal.
mezun.body: A personalized study plan is created by analyzing previous YKS results.
mezun.phase1_text: Identification of previous YKS results and weak topics. Personalized study program.
mezun.phase2_text: Intensive study on priority topics. Instant feedback through one-on-one lessons.
mezun.phase3_text: Regular nationwide full YKS mock exams and detailed analysis sessions for progress tracking.
mezun.result_text: Score improvement in YKS and placement in the target university.
mezun.tech_title: Fen Bilimleri + 345 All Star · Flexible schedule
mezun.tech_intro: We use Fen Bilimleri and 345 All Star publications in this program. Flexible lesson hours.
mezun.tech_tools: Individual analysis · One-on-one lessons · Flexible schedule · Placement support
mezun.meta_title: Graduate & YKS Program | Zekeriyaköy Science Academy
mezun.meta_description: One-on-one lessons and flexible YKS preparation program for graduate students.

acik-lise.title: Open High School
acik-lise.description: Exam preparation support and YKS program for open education high school students.
acik-lise.hero_quote: Open high school is not an obstacle but an opportunity. With the right support, you can reach your goal.
acik-lise.intro: Our Open High School program supports students in preparing for both Open High School exams and YKS. The flexible program structure allows progress at your own pace.
acik-lise.body: Open High School term exams and YKS preparation are carried out in parallel.
acik-lise.phase1_text: Topic summaries and test practice for Open High School term exams.
acik-lise.phase2_text: Carrying the YKS preparation and Open High School process together. TYT and AYT are conducted in parallel.
acik-lise.phase3_text: A flexible study schedule and advisor support prepared according to individual circumstances.
acik-lise.result_text: Open High School diploma and successful YKS result.
acik-lise.tech_intro: We use MoNE and YKS resources. Flexible lesson hours.
acik-lise.tech_tools: Open high school support · YKS preparation · Flexible schedule · Counseling
acik-lise.meta_title: Open High School Program | Zekeriyaköy Science Academy
acik-lise.meta_description: Exam preparation and YKS program for open education high school students.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to students at all grade levels. Nationwide weekly LGS and YKS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Nationwide full weekly mock exams in LGS and YKS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in LGS and YKS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Zekeriyaköy Science Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly LGS and YKS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

rehberlik.title: Guidance
rehberlik.description: One-on-one psychological and academic guidance for career planning, motivation and exam anxiety.
rehberlik.hero_quote: Success comes with working in the right direction. Our guidance program helps you determine the direction.
rehberlik.intro: Our guidance program is a comprehensive counseling service that supports academic and personal development. Exam anxiety, career planning and parent communication are conducted together.
rehberlik.body: The process is transparently monitored through one-on-one sessions and regular parent reports.
rehberlik.phase1_text: One-on-one counseling on goal setting, field selection and creating a study plan.
rehberlik.phase2_text: Expert support for exam anxiety, low motivation and stress management.
rehberlik.phase3_text: Regular parent meetings and student progress reports.
rehberlik.result_text: Students with high confidence, goal-oriented focus and strong motivation.
rehberlik.tech_intro: One-on-one meeting opportunity with an expert teacher and counselor staff.
rehberlik.tech_tools: One-on-one sessions · Career plan · Parent report · Motivational support
rehberlik.meta_description: One-on-one guidance for career planning, exam anxiety management and motivation.

About.meta_title: About Us | Zekeriyaköy Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy
About.meta_description: A well-established educational institution in Sarıyer since 1995. Experienced teachers, individual tracking and proven results.
About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Education in Sarıyer Since 1995
About.content: Zekeriyaköy Nazmi Arıkan Science Academy was founded in 1995 with the aim of contributing to education in Sarıyer. Over the years, we have helped thousands of students reach their target schools.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted educational home where students in Zekeriyaköy and surrounding areas can access quality education in the easiest and most effective way.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their potential and reaching their academic goals. To make a difference with quality education, individual tracking and strong motivation.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.

Contact.meta_description: Contact us for a free consultation. 0212 201 58 48 — zekeriyakoyfenbilimleri@gmail.com
Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Reach out for any questions. We'll get back to you right away.

items.name: Ayşe K.
items.text: With the support I received throughout 8th grade, I got 500 net in LGS. Our teachers were truly very attentive.

items.name: Murat T. (Parent)
items.text: My son studied here in 11th and 12th grade and won a place at a medical faculty. We were amazed by the individual attention.

items.name: Selin A.
items.text: With the graduate program, I won my target department in my second year. The guidance service was invaluable.

items.name: Kerem B.
items.text: I've been here since 7th grade. Thanks to the Mock Exam Club, my exam anxiety went away and I entered LGS with confidence.

items.name: Zeynep Ö. (Parent)
items.role: Daughter placed at Kadıköy Anatolian High School via LGS
items.text: My daughter has been here since 7th grade. Both academic and psychological support were excellent.

items.name: Emre D.
items.text: I joined the program in 12th grade. Thanks to the intensive schedule and personalized lessons, I got into ITU.

items.name: Neslihan A. (Parent)
items.text: The teachers' individual attention to each student amazed us. My son gained confidence in a very short time.

items.name: Can T.
items.text: The detailed mock exam analyses helped me identify and close the gaps in my knowledge.
